homepage.text_excerpt:
Domovská stránka Siemens | Siemens
Skip to main content
Audi virtualizuje výrobu pomocí virtuálních PLC.
Cíl automobilky Audi: virtualizovat automatizační řešení ve výrobě. Nižší počet a méně typů zařízení a převod aplikací na software umožňují rychlejší, robustnější a flexibilnější výrobu.
Případ použití
Více o produktu
Dekódujeme budoucnost energie
Díky našemu inovativnímu softwaru pro sítě a poradenským službám připravujeme cestu pro autonomní správu sítí zaměřenou na spotřebitele. Provozovatelům přenosových a distribučních soustav tak pomáháme s transformací jejich sítí.
Více o produktu
Hlídání závodu: Robotičtí psi zvyšují bezpečnost
Použitím robotické verze nejlepšího přítele člověka může zpracovatelský průmysl zvýšit bezpečnost pracovníků a zlepšit údržbu.
Více informací
Zpráva: Další éra generativní AI
Průmyslové aplikace v nadcházejících letech budou formovány klíčovými trendy, jako jsou agenti umělé inteligence (AI) nebo základní modely.
Stáhnout bezplatnou zprávu
Meet us at Hannover Messe | April 20-24, 2026
Turn data into a competitive advantage with real world Industrial AI. Join us in person or online.
Get your free ticket
Technologie
Upgradujte realitu
Výzvy zítřka vyžadují upgrade ještě dnes. Vaše nápady podporujeme naší umělou inteligencí, simulacemi a inteligentními technologiemi, které vás posunou od digitálního plánu ke vlivu v reálném světě.
Umělá inteligence

Digitální transformace

AI pomáhá s úsporností ve vodohospodářství
Švédská vodohospodářská společnost VA SYD snížila objem ztrátové vody z 10 % na méně než 8 %. Jak? Využila k tomu řešení založené na AI, které detekuje i malé netěsnosti, např. únik pouhých 0,5 litru za sekundu.

about.text:
About us | Siemens
Skip to main content
About us
Our technology accelerates customer transformations with industrial AI, boosting efficiency in factories, enhancing city livability and promoting sustainable transport solutions.
Our purpose
Transform the everyday, for everyone
By combining the real and the digital worlds, we can help accelerate both digitalization and sustainability - so our customers around the world can become more competitive, resilient and sustainable.
Strategy
all
Driven by purpose
We create technology to transform the everyday, for everyone. That is our purpose. Our strategy is how we fulfill this purpose – creating long-term value that extends well beyond business outcomes for the benefit of society.
Transform the everyday
all
A real impact for billions of people
We create technology to transform the everyday, for everyone. From smart factories to sustainable cities, through digital transformation, automation and electrification, we turn everyday moments into extraordinary possibilities.
Innovation
all
Research & innovation
We believe that many technologies that help solve global challenges like climate change already exist today. We utilize our Siemens company core technologies in all businesses.
History
all
A strong history since 1847
From a workshop in a back courtyard in Berlin to a global corporation: Few technology companies can look back on such a long, successful history as Siemens can.
Company presentation
We are a leading technology company
Explore our purpose, strategy, and the ONE Tech company program. This comprehensive slide deck also provides detailed insights into key facts and figures, as well as an overview of our diverse businesses and services.
Download presentation
Our impact
Creating positive change together
Today, our technologies are everywhere—empowering customers, inspiring employees, and shaping the world we want to live in.
90%
90%
of our business enables positive sustainability impact
for our customers
694
694
million metric tons of CO₂e
avoided by customers cumulatively as of 2025
47.9
47.9
million € total community investment in fiscal 2025
58,000
58,000
hours spent by our people in volunteer projects
438
438
million € invested in employee education and training
Governance
Demonstrating responsible business practices
We foster a culture of trust, adhere to ethical standards, and handle data with care. With our governance we apply state-of-the-art systems for effective and responsible business conduct.
See leadership team
all
Compliance and ethics
Compliance forms the basis for all our decisions and activities, and it is the key to integrity when conducting business.
all
Supply chain management
We prioritize sustainability in our supply chain and promotes environmental and social responsibility as well as responsible sourcing.
all
Cybersecurity & data privacy
We believe that data protection is an integral part of responsible business conduct. Our primary objective is to maintain strong data protection and a high level of cybersecurity for the company and all our stakeholders.
all
Human rights
Respecting human rights along the entire value chain is a central element of integrity and responsible corporate governance for us.
all
Responsible AI
For us, responsible AI means counteracting undesirable effects, and carefully balancing them against potential opportunities. To institutionalize this effort, we established a Generative AI Governance task force.
all
Empowered regional teams
We combine global standards with local market expertise. In over 200 countries. Those include regional headquarters, innovation hubs, and manufacturing facilities in Europe, Americas, Asia-Pacific, as well as Middle East & Africa.
Our achievements
Recognized around the world
#82
#82
Time Magazine
One of TIME and Statista's World’s Best Companies for 2025
#44
#44
World's Best Employers
One of the top global companies to work for in the 2025 Forbes ranking.
#48
#48
Best Global Brands
Improved by 2 ranks

products.text:
Industrial digitalization services | Siemens
Skip to main content
Industrial Digitalization Services
Accelerate your digital transformation with Siemens Digitalization Services. Our scalable offerings combine the real and digital worlds by delivering value through IT/OT solutions, improved OEE, advanced AI, predictive maintenance and robust cybersecurity while keeping you ahead of competition.
Explore services
Contact us
Loading application...
DIGITALIZATION SERVICES
Achieve sustainable digital transformation
Siemens Digitalization Services help your business combine the real and digital worlds to turn data into valuable insights. We apply the latest technology standards to help you implement solutions that scale with your needs and support sustainable digital transformation.
Our comprehensive services, covering AI, engineering, and infrastructure management, convert operational challenges into sustainable growth. We drive cutting-edge advancements, significantly enhance process optimization and operational efficiency, including predictive maintenance, and offer inherently scalable solutions such as Industrial Edge Services. With proactive cybersecurity and ensuring seamless IT/OT convergence, our services powered by Siemens Xcelerator, strategically advance your digitalization and sustainability objectives.
Explore services
Analytics and AI Services
Engineering & Integration Services
Industrial Cybersecurity Services
Service Programs and Platforms
Select...
Analytics and AI Services
Engineering & Integration Services
Industrial Cybersecurity Services
Service Programs and Platforms
Network Operation Analyzer
Accomplish industrial network stability with analytics that reveal insights and identify issues without interrupting or disturbing plant operations by scanning, visualizing and analyzing industrial networks and its components.
Shopfloor Monitoring Services
Continuous monitoring of automation hardware, network components or drives with real-time alerts and predictive insights. Reduce downtime through proactive maintenance supported by direct connection to Siemens domain experts.
OEE Solutions
Identify the full potential of your production processes by optimizing overall equipment effectiveness with OEE Solutions. With our state-of-the-art products as foundation, we deliver a tailored, turnkey solution from one hand that grows with your business and helps you achieve long-term success.
SINUMERIK Optimization Check
SINUMERIK Optimization Check is a standardized Siemens service that analyzes NC archives, Auto Servo Tuning (AST) measurements, and machine‑specific data. It delivers expert recommendations to improve productivity, motion quality, and machine performance.
Brownfield Analytics
Brownfield Analytics visualizes shopfloor KPIs and machine health for SINUMERIK and third-party machines. It offers , offering performance insights, machine-condition evaluation, and mechatronic analysis to reduce downtime and improve productivity. APIs enable se
